hooks.command: node -e "const f=process.env.CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH||''; const m=f.match(/(apps|packages)\/[^\/]+/); if(m){const p=m[0]; try{const n=require('./'+p+'/package.json').name; require('child_process').execSync('pnpm --filter '+n+' type-check',{stdio:'inherit'})}catch(e){}}" 2>/dev/null || true
